title: Crystal Depths – New Geode Types
description: Adds rare new geodes with unique crystal drops. Mine budding blocks with Silk Touch and grow your own renewable resources at home.
body:
**Crystal Depths – New Geode Types**

Crystal Depths expands underground exploration by adding four new rare geode types to your Minecraft world. 

![Diamond Geode](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/522b0313030c4ba4f7ae5abaa9543f3c0d8be211_0.webp)
![Golden Geode](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9382902449e4575a749687e5f43a486f9a2bb05_0.webp)

These geodes are significantly rarer than standard amethyst geodes, making them a valuable discovery for players who love mining and exploration. Each geode contains unique crystal clusters that provide a new way to gather resources.

The standout feature of this mod is the ability to obtain **Budding Geodes** using Silk Touch. This allows you to transport them back to your base and grow your own crystals over time, turning your home into a renewable source of valuable materials.
![Buddings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b55b42ebb4dc2e8e6d3a3bdc923b377a9826c932_0.webp)


Enhance your mining experience and uncover the hidden riches deep beneath the surface with Crystal Depths.
